headline: Jim Cramer on ServiceNow: “I Think We’ll Get a Very Solid Number”
summary: ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE:NOW) was one of the stocks on Jim Cramer’s recent Mad Money game plan. headline: Truist Maintains Buy Rating on ServiceNow (NOW)
summary: ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE:NOW) is one of the 10 Best Stocks to Buy for the Next Decade. On April 15, 2026, Truist lowered its price target on ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE:NOW) to $125 from $175 and maintained a Buy rating ahead of quarterly results. The firm said it expects strong performance with potential upside to consensus estimates, […]
